scripts.prebuild:
node -e "const fs=require('fs'); fs.writeFileSync('src/content/docs/testing-status.md', '---
title: Testing Status
description: Live tracking of tested features and connectivity.
---

' + fs.readFileSync('../TESTING.md')); fs.writeFileSync('src/content/docs/roadmap.mdx', '---
title: Roadmap
description: Planned features, architectural improvements, and future milestones for the Antimatter ecosystem.
sidebar:
  order: 10
---

import AuthorCard from '../../components/AuthorCard.astro';

' + fs.readFileSync('../ROADMAP.md') + '

<hr class="gradient-divider" />

<AuthorCard />')"
